description_long: This kiosk features a modern, minimalist design with a predominantly white and blue color scheme. The structure includes a large, flat roof with a rounded blue overhang at the front, providing shade and visual interest. The front area has a recessed counter space, likely for customer interaction, and a large digital display or screen mounted on the back wall. The right side of the kiosk includes a set of open shelves and a rectangular panel, possibly for storage or display purposes. The left side is mostly solid, with a single supporting column visible. The overall form is geometric and clean, with smooth surfaces and a functional layout suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, white and blue kiosk with a flat roof, rounded overhang, front counter, digital display, and side shelving. Its clean, geometric design is ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main counter, rounded blue overhang, and a large digital display on the back wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the overhang, the supporting column, and the recessed counter area.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a solid blue back wall with open shelving and a rectangular panel on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the shelving unit and the solid left side of the kiosk.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the back wall, no visible printed or illuminated signage
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with a rounded blue overhang at the front, smooth and minimalist with no visible decorative elements
